goal: Add a Back button to the Ask-a-Question card-selection screen (back to Topic+Mode selection)
done: Added a top-left 'Back' button (chevron + label) to the question-draw card-selection topbar (EN 'Back' + TH 'ย้อนกลับ', + th mirror). Absolute-left so the spread eyebrow stays centred. Wired in renderQuestionDraw: if the user came from question.html (same-origin referrer) it history.back() (preserves their typed question + topic); otherwise (deep link/share) navigates to the localized /question.html. Headless-verified 390x844. Cache-bust 20260623c -> 20260623d; www synced.
fix: Back button on question-draw → history.back (preserve state) or /question.html fallback.
